scripts.build: node scripts/clean.mjs && NODE_ENV=production BUNDLER_MODE=production bundler build --config bundler.config.mjs
scripts.prod: node scripts/clean.mjs && NODE_ENV=production BUNDLER_MODE=production bundler build --config bundler.config.mjs && NODE_ENV=production node --import @bundler/assets/register --require @bundler/react-rsc-plugin/register-source-maps scripts/start.mjs
scripts.dev: node scripts/clean.mjs && NODE_ENV=development BUNDLER_MODE=development bundler dev --config bundler.config.mjs
